/usr/bin/ar qc libf1ap.a CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_common.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_ids.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_interface_management.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_paging.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_rrc_message_transfer.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_task.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_cu_ue_context_management.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_du_interface_management.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_du_paging.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_du_rrc_message_transfer.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_du_task.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_du_ue_context_management.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_handlers.c.o CMakeFiles/f1ap.dir/openair2/F1AP/f1ap_itti_messaging.c.o openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/f1ap_lib_common.c.o openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/f1ap_rrc_message_transfer.c.o openair2/F1AP/lib/CMakeFiles/f1ap_lib.dir/f1ap_interface_management.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libf1ap.a
